name: Heinrich Dewus — death date and additional children (Milwaukee, 1936)
researcher_question: When did Heinrich Dewus of Milwaukee, Wisconsin (born about 1850 in Pommerania, Germany) die, and did he and his wife Augusta have children besides the four already in the tree?
notes: Record-hint fixture (filtered-list-samples.csv row 1, flags adds_son/adds_daughter/adds_death, confidence 3). Findings are a DRAFT transcribed from the hint record (GenealogyBank newspaper obituary, 28 Aug 1936, Milwaukee: joint entry indexed under Henry Dewus AND Henry Downs, naming seven children), whose identity with the tree family is unverified — roughly half the records in this hint batch are false matches, though four of the seven obituary children align with children already in the tree. Genealogist adjudication must confirm the match, revise the findings, or convert them to polarity-avoid guards.
